description_long: This is a medium-sized wooden barrel with a cylindrical body and slightly bulging sides, constructed from vertical wooden staves. The barrel is reinforced by three wide, brown metal hoops adorned with evenly spaced silver rivets, which encircle the body and provide structural integrity. The wood grain is clearly visible, giving the surface a rustic, natural appearance, and the ends of the barrel are flat and circular. A small, golden spigot is attached to one end, indicating the barrel is designed to dispense liquid contents. The barrel rests on a simple wooden stand, elevating it slightly above the ground for easy access to the spigot. The overall design suggests it is used for storing or dispensing beverages such as beer, wine, or water in urban or communal settings.
description: A wooden barrel with metal hoops, visible wood grain, and a golden spigot, resting on a wooden stand.
description_view_0: Front view showing the circular wooden end, wood grain, and a golden spigot at the bottom center.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the full length of the barrel, three brown metal hoops with silver rivets, and the wooden stand beneath.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the flat wooden end without a spigot, highlighting the wood grain and stand.
description_view_3: Opposite side view similar to view 1, with the spigot just visible on the right edge.
attribute_banding_or_reinforcement: brown metal hoops with silver rivets
